threats.title: Default PUK PIN — factory credentials used
Fast GEN AUTH (~53ms) — consistent with ECC or modern hardware
Bulk container erasure — 24 zero-length PUT DATA operations
threats.detail: 24 PUT DATA with empty value field (53 00). Consistent with factory reset or administrative purge.

threats.title: Incomplete provisioning — key templates written but certificate slots empty
threats.detail: PUT DATA targeting FF90xx succeeded, but 5FC1xx reads returned 6A80. Card will fail smart card logon until certificates are provisioned.
